economic_notes: Nation holds $1,000,000 convertible debenture in Nauticol Energy LTD at 6% interest maturing December 2023. Five government business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method: Driftpile First Nation Enterprises Inc. (100%), Driftpile Business Corporation (100%), Driftpile Cree Nation Limited Partnerships (99%), Driftpile Timber Management Limited Partnership (99%), Driftpile Agricultural Settlement Trust. COVID-19 additional funding received $3,318,785. Employer pension contributions $385,367.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2022 (not 2024). Five entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs). The prior year (2021) included a massive $134,879,644 Agricultural Benefits Settlement one-time item which drove prior surplus to $61,926,220 and prior accumulated surplus to $103,736,429. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $21,159,971 + LSLIRC $2,134,749 + CMHC subsidy $267,360 + FNDF $209,555 + Ottawa Trust interest $28,737 + Agricultural Benefits Trust disbursement $2,542,894 = $26,343,266 less intercompany; used ISC+LSLIRC+CMHC+FNDF = $23,771,635 plus Ottawa Trust $28,737 plus Agricultural Benefits $2,542,894 = $26,343,266. OSR calculated as total revenue $30,590,134 minus total government transfers $24,051,680. No schedule of remuneration provided. CMHC replacement reserve underfunded by $35,112 at year end. Deferred revenue increased significantly to $14,949,146. Large RBC loan of $6,500,000 repayable July 31, 2022 included in long-term debt.
